title: local settings の allowedDomains は project の全遮断([])に配列マージされ egress を開く -> local ドリフトで外部通信が通る。対照の未登録ドメインは遮断のまま

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: curl -sS --max-time 15 https://example.com -o nettest.out && echo OK > NETMARKER.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: Command completed successfully. No output was produced (expected with `-s` flag on curl and output redirected to files).

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: curl -sS --max-time 15 https://www.wikipedia.org -o nettest2.out && echo OK > NETMARKER2.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: Command failed: exit code 56, CONNECT tunnel failed with response 403. The request to www.wikipedia.org was blocked.

hypothesis: sandbox.network.allowedDomains はスコープ間で配列マージ(和集合)される: project が [](全遮断)でも local settings が [example.com] を足すと example.com への egress が開く(allow x ok, NETMARKER 生成)。= 開発者の local 編集(または将来 allowedDomains へ永続化する承認)で worker の全遮断が破れる。対照の未登録ドメイン(wikipedia.org)は遮断のまま(allow x ng)。運用含意: egress を死守するには managed 設定の allowManagedDomainsOnly で非管理スコープの allowedDomains を無視させる(project settings だけでは local から開けられる)。
